description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: Silver dial with silver hands Strap style: Brown genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Date aperture on the dial, hour indicator at the 6 hour slot, branding on the dial and screw to reset time Waterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Size Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 10 mm
